debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
x : ℝ
hxge : x ≥ ↑n
hxlt : x < ↑n + 1
⊢ ↑(∏ k ∈ Icc 1 (primeCountingReal x), nth Nat.Prime k / (nth Nat.Prime k - 1)) ≤
    ↑(∏ k ∈ Icc 1 (primeCountingReal x), (k + 1) / k)

proof:
norm_cast
        apply Finset.prod_le_prod
        · intros k hk; exact Nat.zero_le _
        · intros k hk
          have h_k : 1 ≤ k := (mem_Icc.mp hk).1
          have h_pk : 2 < nth Nat.Prime k := by
            have := Nat.add_two_le_nth_prime k
            omega
          have h_div1 : nth Nat.Prime k / (nth Nat.Prime k - 1) ≤ 1 := by
            apply Nat.le_of_lt_succ
            apply (Nat.div_lt_iff_lt_mul (by omega)).mpr
            omega
          have h_div2 : 1 ≤ (k + 1) / k := by
            apply (Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le (by omega)).mpr
            omega
          exact Nat.le_trans h_div1 h_div2
successful_attempts:
norm_cast
        apply Finset.prod_le_prod
        · intros k hk; exact Nat.zero_le _
        · intros k hk
          have h_k : 1 ≤ k := (mem_Icc.mp hk).1
          have h_pk : 2 < nth Nat.Prime k := by
            have := Nat.add_two_le_nth_prime k
            omega
          have h_div1 : nth Nat.Prime k / (nth Nat.Prime k - 1) ≤ 1 := by
            apply Nat.le_of_lt_succ
            apply (Nat.div_lt_iff_lt_mul (by omega)).mpr
            omega
          have h_div2 : 1 ≤ (k + 1) / k := by
            apply (Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le (by omega)).mpr
            omega
          exact Nat.le_trans h_div1 h_div2
